source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Freda wants to write a number in each of the nine cells of this figure so that the sum of the three numbers on each diameter is 13 and the sum of the eight numbers on the circumference is 40. What number must be written in the central cell? <image1>

image_dependency: question_text explicitly refers to 'this figure' and asks about the 'central cell', so the layout is required
the terms 'diameter' and 'circumference' indicate spatial/diagram structure not fully encoded in text alone
multi_step: the problem combines multiple constraints: each diameter sums to 13 and the eight circumference cells sum to 40
solving for the center requires relating the center to the diameter totals and the outer-ring total, not a single direct lookup
answer_type is numeric with no choices, so the solver must derive the value rather than select it
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text='3', which is straightforward to check
the stated sums create explicit arithmetic constraints that can be validated against a proposed center value

decision_reasons: 核心资产齐全：题干、图像和数值答案都存在，且 asset registry passed
虽然题目对图形拓扑依赖较强，但当前图像资产已可用，因此不构成核心语义缺失
答案为可校验的数值型，题目约束明确，样本可验证性高
